title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MAGDALENA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MAGDALENA, PROVINCE OF LAGUNA, TO ANANIAS LAICO ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3206 / 53 OG No. 15, 4775 (August 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1643, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MAGDALENA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MAGDALENA, PROVINCE OF LAGUNA, TO ANANIAS LAICO ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Magdalena Elementary School in the Municipality of Magdalena, Province of Laguna, is hereby changed to Ananias Laico Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
